source: gallery-dl authenticated pull (images only, videos excluded)

images.caption:
A conversation about authenticity.

Honored to represent Walmart at the 40th Annual Conference of the 100 Black Men of America and contribute to a discussion on identity, leadership, and the impact of the digital world.

One takeaway: authenticity isn’t about sharing everything. It’s about making sure the person the world sees is rooted in the person you actually are.

Grateful for the invitation and the opportunity to be part of the conversation.

Turns out, being yourself is still one of the most underrated leadership skills. 

Special thanks to @regine.moore @the1solesearcher 

#40yearsofimpact #100blackmen #mrqfears #walmart #blackexecellence

Posting this one from the archive.

Shot in 2019 and still feels like part of my visual language.

Before the large-scale retail activations, windows, and brand storytelling… there were editorials like this. Styling looks, shaping a mood, and figuring out how fashion could communicate something beyond the clothes.

This work still feels like me.

More archives + current work coming. ✨

in the pages of @industry.magazine 
Photography @markoberlin 
Styling @mrqfears 
Mua @ericjallen 
Hair @hairbyrenecortez 
Model @michaelav theindustryla 
Dress @kimwestlatex 
Heels @gianvitorossi @cocopari 
Jewelry @linguanigra 
#QuentinFears #FashionEditorial  #StylingWork #CreativeLeadership

Being in the room with leadership matters.

Even more when you’re contributing to how the vision comes to life.

Proud to be contributing to the work shaping how Walmart shows up today and to be doing it with a team I truly respect. 

Congrats to an amazing Pop Up! 🎉 210 Lafayette, NYC till May 10th. 

#CreativeLeadership #VisualMerchandising #BrandExperience #mrqfears

Honored to be in the room where purpose meets presence.

An evening with the @nationalactionnetwork , celebrating voices and leaders who continue to move culture and community forward like @real_sharpton @theebillyporter, @lawrence_odonnell, @iamlouiscarr, and @officialmlking3

Showing up, standing tall, and staying aligned with the work. No justice, no peace. Thank you @regine.moore

It’s never too late to honor culture and talent! I’m incredibly honored to have been a guest and had a seat at the table @indigifashion, invited by @the1solesearcher and @zoya_theexplorer. Indigenous Fashion Week was truly incredible, and I’m excited to see its growth and success. Sometimes, we forget that fashion is more than just beautiful clothing; it serves as a medium to showcase and express our culture, pride, and self-identity. 

#mrqfears #createsparks #indigenousfashion

One of my favorite projects of the year bringing The Forbes X Walmart Creators Upfronts to life with the rest of the VM Styling team celebrating innovation, accessibility, and the vibrant community of creators shaping the future of social commerce. 

One of the highlights of the evening was connecting with Sherry Phillips, CEO of Forbes. We talked about fashion, the importance of bringing your personal style to life as a leader, and how authenticity, confidence, and presence play a key role in inspiring others.

I left the event energized by the creative synergy in the room and proud to represent a team that continues to merge storytelling, design, and purpose in everything we do. 🎉

#WalmartFashion #Forbes #WalmartCreator #LeadershipInStyle #CreatorEconomy #VisualMerchandising #AuthenticLeadership #BrandExperience #InfluencerEvent #StyledByVM #Collaboration #CreativeStrategy

What a chic little event @linguafrancanyc townshouse showcasing “Portrait Mode with Sophie Elgort,” @sophieelgort her photography and interviews with the likes of her father @arthurelgort who had changed the landscape of fashion photography also featuring Skylar Brandt, Rita Moreno and Nile Rodgers, are available to stream @allartstv site, app and YouTube.  #nycfashionevent #mrqfears #fashionblogger #fashionphotography #sophieelgort #arthurelgort #nycfashion #quentinfears #allarts #linguafranca #chic

Still buzzing from the magic at the @sageusa Gala! 🌈✨ A night full of heart, joy, and community as we came together to support LGBTQ+ elders like @beverlyglenncopeland and his contributions to music and LGBTQ rights. 

The fabulous @ninawest brought the house down with her charisma! 🪩💖

It’s not just about a gala—it’s about honoring our elders who paved the way and making sure they’re celebrated and cared for. It’s a reminder of the power of showing up for each other.

Swipe for moments that will make you smile. And shoutout to @joshuadanforth for the invite! 💜
Who’s with me in keeping this spirit alive every day? Drop a ❤️🏳️‍🌈 if you agree!

#mrqfears #SageGala #ChosenFamily #LGBTQLove #NinaWest #CommunityStrong #celebritystylist #lgtbqelders #lgtbiq🏳️‍🌈

I’ve had so many feelings this week with anxiety being at the forefront. I haven’t felt this way since the passing of my mom, brother and father all during the pandemic. 💔

This time was scary af! But it was a valuable time, a growing time where I learned so much about myself. 🍀

I learned that I’m resilient, adaptable, and smarter than I gave myself credit. From there I grew and am still growing. I was holding myself back in so many ways. But most importantly I learned that I am strong! 💪🏾 

Now, I’m choosing not to let this moment define me and to take away my joy. I choose to lean into my own happiness. 🤩 

So here are some pics of my trip to Palms Springs during Pride 🏳️‍🌈 with a cutie and some friends.

Right now, I’m stepping into my Black Boy Joy era no matter what!! 🕺🏾

PS for those that saw my last post about @rthshop the paint splattered workmen pants are for that cute boutique. 👖

#mrqfears #fashionstylist #mensfashion #palmsprings #lgtbq🌈 #palmspringspride #choosingjoy #findinghappiness #grief# #lossingaparent

Thanks Kim & Duff for showing me around @rthshop  one of the coolest stores in Palm Springs. 🌴🌵 

I felt so extra special in the store with them and they encouraged me to do a little fashion show. LMK what you think. 💭 Here are some of my favorite pieces in the boutique. ⬇️⬇️⬇️

I loved that I could wear this uniform/monochromatic look in all cream or break out the separate pieces and incorporate them into outfits I could wear every day. 🥋👖

#mrqfears #mensstyle #palmspringsstyle #mensfashion #palmspring #californiafashion #indiedesigners

Who says you can’t mix business with a little edge? The sharpness of a double breasted blazer w the relaxed vibe of camo shorts, reminds me that fashion isn’t about fitting into a box-it’s about self expression and ultimately feeling good!! 👘❤️😎

Congratulations to my friend @sweetsnfakemeat Andrea Jenkins the founder and designer of @moore_nyc on a phenomenal runway show at Grand Central Station. Loved the Jacquard shift dresses with bell shelves, the quilted coats and the chartreuse that was threaded throughout the collection. 👘❤️✨

#mrqfears #nyfw #fashionweek #indiedesigner #wearmoregoods

This is my favorite runway show of the season! Not only is it joyful and exuberant, it’s informative. Thank you @runwayofdreams for bringing awareness to the importance of adaptive fashion. Everyone deserves to feel comfortable, confident, beautiful and sexy - and fashion has this type of power! 👘❤️✨

#mrqfears #runwayofdreams #nyfw #adaptivefashion #nyfw2024
